title: Switch to Dashboard view and see statistics
description: Verifies the sidebar can switch to the Dashboard view and the dashboard shows its primary statistics content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard nav item
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed

title: Switch to Organizer view
description: Verifies the sidebar can switch to the Organizer view and the organizer primary controls are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Verify the folder selection and scan controls are displayed

title: Switch to History view
description: Verifies the sidebar can switch to the History view and the history panel content area loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the History nav item
Verify the organize history view is displayed

title: Switch to Backup view and see browser-only mode warning
description: Verifies the sidebar can switch to the Backup view and an inline note/warning appears when file system operations require Electron.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Backup nav item
Verify a warning or inline note is visible indicating file system operations require Electron

title: Switch to Settings view
description: Verifies the sidebar can switch to the Settings view and settings content is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Settings nav item
Verify the settings view is displayed

title: Sidebar navigation does not reload the app shell
description: Verifies navigation changes the main content while keeping the single-page shell (sidebar) present.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Dashboard nav item
Click the Settings nav item
Verify the sidebar navigation is still visible

title: Pick a source folder by entering a valid path and attempt to scan
description: Verifies the organizer accepts a manually entered folder path and a scan attempt results in either a file list or a file system unavailable indication (browser mode).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /Users/test/Documents into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Verify either a scanned file list is displayed or a file system unavailable warning/error is visible

title: Enter a non-existent folder path and see an error toast
description: Verifies scanning with an invalid/inaccessible path surfaces an error toast instead of proceeding silently.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /path/that/does/not/exist-12345 into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Verify an error toast is visible indicating the folder cannot be accessed or the file system is unavailable

title: Attempt to scan with an empty folder path
description: Verifies the scan action is blocked or validation feedback is shown when no folder path is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill  into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Verify a validation error or blocking feedback is visible for the missing folder path

title: Enter a folder path and confirm it appears as the selected source
description: Verifies the entered path is reflected in the organizer as the chosen source folder before scanning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /Users/test/Desktop into the folder path field
Verify the selected source folder is shown as /Users/test/Desktop

title: Start AI analysis after scan attempt and observe outcome (progress or error)
description: Verifies the AI analysis trigger produces visible progress when it starts, or a visible error when prerequisites are missing (no scan results or unavailable file system).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /Users/test/Documents into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Click the analyze with AI action
Verify either analysis progress is displayed or an error toast is visible indicating analysis cannot start

title: Trigger AI analysis without a configured API key and see error toast
description: Verifies the app shows an error toast about a missing/invalid API key when AI analysis is triggered without configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Click the analyze with AI action
Verify an error toast is visible indicating a missing or invalid API key

title: AI analysis progress UI appears when analysis is started
description: Verifies that when analysis starts, a progress indicator is shown to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /Users/test/Documents into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Click the analyze with AI action
Verify a real-time analysis progress indicator is displayed

title: Analyzed file categories are displayed after analysis completes (if analysis runs)
description: Verifies the UI shows category results for files once analysis completes; if analysis cannot run, it should show a visible error instead of categories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Organizer nav item
Fill /Users/test/Documents into the folder path field
Click the scan folder action
Click the analyze with AI action
Wait for analysis to finish or fail
Verify either analyzed file categories are displayed or an analysis error toast is visible

title: Organizer: View suggested organize plan grouped by category
description: Verifies the organizer view can display a suggested organize plan grouped by categories after analysis has produced suggestions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Organizer view
Wait for the suggested organize plan section to load
Verify a list of suggested file moves grouped by category is displayed

title: Organizer: Toggle inclusion of a suggested file move
description: Verifies the user can include or exclude an individual suggested file move from the plan.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Organizer view
Wait for suggested file moves to be displayed
Toggle inclusion for one suggested file move
Verify the selected file move shows an updated included or excluded state

title: Organizer: Execute plan in browser-only mode shows error and does not complete
description: Verifies executing the organize plan without Electron file APIs results in an error toast and no success confirmation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Organizer view
Wait for the suggested organize plan section to load
Click the control to execute the organize plan
Verify an error toast indicating file operations are unavailable is visible
Verify no success confirmation is visible

title: Organizer: Attempt to execute with no suggested moves is prevented
description: Verifies the UI prevents executing when there are no suggested file moves selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Organizer view
Wait for suggested file moves to be displayed
Toggle exclusion for all suggested file moves
Click the control to execute the organize plan
Verify the plan does not execute and the user remains in the organizer plan state

title: Organizer: Success toast path is not asserted in browser mode
description: Verifies the organizer execute action provides user feedback and remains responsive without relying on successful file operations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Organizer view
Wait for the suggested organize plan section to load
Click the control to execute the organize plan
Verify a toast notification is visible

title: Dashboard: Empty state shown before any scans have run
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an empty-state prompt when no scan results exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Dashboard view
Verify an empty-state prompt advising the user to scan a folder is visible

title: Dashboard: Statistics sections render when scan data exists
description: Verifies the dashboard can display file type distribution and size statistics when data is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Dashboard view
Wait for dashboard content to finish loading
Verify file type distribution is displayed
Verify file size statistics are displayed

title: Dashboard: Category breakdown charts section is present
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a category breakdown visualization area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the Dashboard view
Scroll to the category breakdown area
Verify category breakdown charts are displayed or an empty-state message for charts is visible

title: History: Empty state prevents clearing when no sessions exist
description: Verifies attempting to clear history when there are no sessions shows an inline message indicating there is no history to clear.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the History view
Click the control to clear history
Verify an inline message indicates there is no history to clear

title: History: Open a history session to view moved-file details
description: Verifies the user can open a past organize session to view its moved-file details when sessions are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation item to open the History view
Wait for the list of past organize sessions to load
Click a history session entry to open its details
Verify moved-file details for the selected session are displayed

title: Manual backup tab loads and can open Backup view
description: Verifies the Backup view is reachable from the sidebar and the manual backup UI is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Verify the manual backup panel is displayed

title: Switch between Manual Backup, Auto Backup, and Backup History tabs
description: Verifies tab navigation within the Backup panel shows the corresponding sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Switch to the Auto Backup tab
Switch to the Backup History tab
Switch back to the Manual Backup tab
Verify the manual backup panel is displayed

title: Start backup in browser-only mode shows error and does not proceed
description: Verifies starting a backup without filesystem capability produces an error state/toast and no progress begins.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Fill a value into the encryption password field
Fill the same value into the confirm password field
Click the control to start the backup
Verify an error toast or error state is displayed for the backup
Verify backup progress is not running

title: Encryption password mismatch prevents starting backup
description: Verifies the UI blocks starting a backup when password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Fill a value into the encryption password field
Fill a different value into the confirm password field
Click the control to start the backup
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible
Verify backup progress is not running

title: Auto-backup can be toggled on and off
description: Verifies the auto-backup enablement toggle changes state from off to on and back off.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Switch to the Auto Backup tab
Toggle auto-backup on
Toggle auto-backup off
Verify auto-backup is shown as disabled

title: Configure an auto-backup schedule values are accepted
description: Verifies schedule inputs can be set and persist within the UI session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Switch to the Auto Backup tab
Select a valid auto-backup interval
Select a valid auto-backup time
Verify the selected schedule values are displayed

title: Backup history empty state is shown when no backups exist
description: Verifies the history tab shows an empty state when there are no backup entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Switch to the Backup History tab
Verify an empty state message is visible for backup history

title: Save settings with valid-looking API key and rules shows success
description: Verifies Settings allows entering an API key and custom rules and saving shows a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Fill a valid-looking value into the Gemini API key field
Fill "Rule A: Documents -> Work" into the custom classification rules field
Submit the settings save action
Verify a success toast confirming settings were saved is visible

title: Invalid or malformed API key prevents save
description: Verifies Settings rejects an invalid API key and indicates an error without saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Fill "invalid-key" into the Gemini API key field
Submit the settings save action
Verify an API key validation error is visible

title: Toggle API key visibility changes masking behavior
description: Verifies the API key visibility toggle switches between masked and visible input display.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Fill "test-key-123" into the Gemini API key field
Toggle API key visibility on
Toggle API key visibility off
Verify the API key field is masked

title: Saved settings persist after revisiting Settings view
description: Verifies that saved API key and rules are retained when navigating away and back within the SPA.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Fill "persist-key-456" into the Gemini API key field
Fill "Rule B: Images -> Personal" into the custom classification rules field
Submit the settings save action
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Verify "Rule B: Images -> Personal" is present in the custom classification rules field

title: Saving settings with empty custom rules still succeeds
description: Verifies that custom rules can be left empty while saving settings successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the Settings view
Fill a valid-looking value into the Gemini API key field
Fill "" into the custom classification rules field
Submit the settings save action
Verify a success toast confirming settings were saved is visible

title: Expand console, clear logs, and verify empty state
description: Verifies the console bar expands and clearing entries empties the console.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the console bar tab to expand the console
Click the control to clear log entries
Verify the console is empty

title: Trigger unsupported file operation logs an error in console
description: Verifies attempting a file operation in browser-only mode results in an error log entry in the console.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the console bar tab to expand the console
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Fill a value into the encryption password field
Fill the same value into the confirm password field
Click the control to start the backup
Verify an error log entry is displayed in the console

title: Console collapses and expands without losing state
description: Verifies collapsing and re-expanding the console keeps it functional and visible when opened again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the console bar tab to expand the console
Click the console bar tab to collapse the console
Click the console bar tab to expand the console
Verify the console panel is displayed

title: Console displays log entry types with each entry
description: Verifies log entries include a visible type indicator (such as info, success, warn, error).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the console bar tab to expand the console
Click the sidebar item to open the Backup view
Fill a value into the encryption password field
Fill the same value into the confirm password field
Click the control to start the backup
Verify at least one log entry shows a log type indicator

title: Success toast appears and auto-dismisses after saving settings
description: Verifies that a successful settings save triggers a success toast that disappears automatically.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open settings
Fill a new value into a settings field that can be saved
Submit the settings save action
Verify a success toast notification is visible
Wait for 5 seconds
Verify no toast notification is visible

title: Error toast appears and auto-dismisses when AI analysis fails due to missing API key
description: Verifies that triggering AI analysis without a configured API key shows an error toast that auto-dismisses.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the scan or analysis view
Trigger the AI analysis action
Verify an error toast notification is visible
Wait for 5 seconds
Verify no toast notification is visible

title: Error toast appears and auto-dismisses when backup action fails in browser mode
description: Verifies that a backup attempt in an environment without Electron file APIs produces an error toast that auto-dismisses.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open the backup view
Trigger a backup action
Verify an error toast notification is visible
Wait for 5 seconds
Verify no toast notification is visible

title: New toast replaces or stacks without blocking interaction and auto-dismisses
description: Verifies multiple toasts can appear from repeated actions and that they resolve without leaving stale toasts.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open settings
Fill a new value into a settings field that can be saved
Submit the settings save action
Fill a different new value into the same settings field
Submit the settings save action
Verify a toast notification is visible
Wait for 5 seconds
Verify no toast notification is visible

title: Toast does not persist across sidebar navigation and auto-dismisses on its own
description: Verifies that a toast disappears after its timeout even if the user navigates to another view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item to open settings
Fill a new value into a settings field that can be saved
Submit the settings save action
Verify a toast notification is visible
Click the sidebar item to open another view
Wait for 5 seconds
Verify no toast notification is visible
